title: Control plane (dashboard ↔ runner)
notes: JSON control file the runner polls each loop; kill switch / pause / weights now reach live trading.

title: Kill switch flattens positions and halts entries
notes: Kill switch now flattens all open positions and blocks new entries, reversible from the dashboard.

title: Exit-order failure handling with retry + escalation
notes: Position is kept open on a failed exit and retried with backoff; escalates to broker close-all after 3 tries.

title: Proactive daily-loss halt
notes: Monitor thread halts + flattens the moment session PnL breaches the daily loss limit, independent of entries.

title: Position reconciliation on restart
notes: On startup the runner adopts open trades from the DB so positions are never orphaned after a crash.

title: Best-effort fill-price confirmation
notes: Polls order status once and books PnL at the actual fill price when available (full reconciliation still pending).

title: Consistent SEBI strategy tag on all orders
notes: Entry and exit orders both tag with the canonical strategy id used in the trade log.

title: Position sizer can stand down (0 lots)
notes: Kelly / heat / regime layers can now reduce to no-trade instead of being floored at 1 lot.

title: Regime bonus no longer flips signal sign
notes: Regime bonus adjusts magnitude in the direction of the composite; can no longer invert long/short near zero.

title: Mean reversion fires only at extremes
notes: Gated on genuine oversold/overbought extremes instead of any bb_pct_b != 0.5.

title: NaN-safe feature reads
notes: Replaced the `value or default` idiom that turned legitimate 0.0 readings into fallbacks.

title: Transaction-cost model (STT / brokerage / GST / slippage)
notes: Net PnL now subtracts a realistic Indian intraday cost model; daily stats report gross, costs and net.

title: Blackout-window time arithmetic fix
notes: Open-blackout end time computed with timedelta math so it can't raise on minute overflow.

title: Kill-switch API accepts a body
notes: Fixed the 422 — kill switch endpoint now takes {active} and writes to the control plane.

title: Equity-curve field aligned
notes: API returns `equity` in chronological order so the Overview area chart renders.

title: Auto-trade / pause toggle
notes: Control-backed master switch to pause new entries without flattening, from the Live page.

title: Feature Tracker / Roadmap page
notes: This board — track what's added (with dates), in progress, and pending.

title: Live page rewired to real endpoints
notes: Live ops console now polls real status / scan / positions / control endpoints instead of missing SSE routes.

title: AI Models page rewired to real endpoint
notes: Reads /api/models/status (file presence + training log) instead of a non-existent /api/rl/status.

title: Models status API endpoint
notes: Reports saved-model presence and last training metrics for the AI Models page.

title: Backtest run persistence
notes: Completed backtests are written to backtest_runs so the history panel populates.

title: Walk-forward backtest correctness
notes: Per-(symbol,fold) portfolios, intrabar SL/target fills, real sizing, per-fold metrics.

title: Session-anchored VWAP
notes: Replaced the rolling 78-bar VWAP with a true session-reset VWAP.

title: Operational store migrated DuckDB→SQLite (WAL)
notes: SQLite WAL with thread-local connections: concurrent cross-process readers + a writer, so the runner and dashboard share one DB. DuckDB now analytics-only. Proven by scripts/test_concurrency.py.

title: Kelly position-sizing layer wired + normalized
notes: Kelly was inert (update_kelly_stats never called) and, once wired, the raw quarter-Kelly fraction zeroed every trade. Runner now feeds realized win-rate/reward:risk from PnLTracker; multiplier normalized to scale around 1.0 instead of rounding to 0. Tested by scripts/test_kelly_wiring.py.

title: Score→lots bands match the documented spec
notes: Sizer now uses the documented 0.65/0.70/0.75 tiers (0.55–0.65 = no trade, CHOPPY zeroes the 1-lot tier) via config.SCORE_TIER_*, capped by the risk profile — replacing the old STRONG+midpoint logic. Tested by scripts/test_position_tiers.py.

title: OpenAlgo API key not duplicated / not persisted
notes: Key sent once in the JSON body (OpenAlgo's auth); removed the duplicate x-api-key header and redacted it from OrderResult.raw_response (paper + live). Tested by scripts/test_openalgo_security.py.

title: Model tests assert correctness (not smoke prints)
notes: macro/micro/RL-exit tests rewritten with real assertions (valid AUC, predictions vary, persistence round-trip), pytest-collectable, temp model paths. Caught + fixed a numpy.bool_ leak in MicroModelResult.should_enter.

title: Theta straddle sizing driven by config
notes: vix_to_lots now derives bands from vix_floor/full_size/ceiling/panic (added configurable vix_full_size) instead of hardcoded 11/14/18/20; defaults reproduce the old bands. Tested by scripts/test_theta_sizing.py.

title: Header UX: hover tooltips + editable risk/capital + broker funds
notes: Reusable Tip component explains every header control + nav item on hover. RISK is now an editable dropdown and CAPITAL is click-to-edit (POST /system/risk, /system/capital — applied live via the control plane + saved to .env). New BROKER tile shows actual Upstox funds via GET /system/funds (OpenAlgo /api/v1/funds; '—' in paper). Sizer/breaker take an injected risk profile so changes apply without restart.

title: Broker-side bracket / OCO orders
notes: Place SL/target at the exchange so positions survive a runner crash.

title: Forced bar-close timer in feed
notes: Flush the in-progress candle on a wall clock even when no new tick arrives.

title: Stale-LTP alert (no entry-price fallback)
notes: Treat a missing LTP as an alert instead of using entry price (which disables stops).

title: Volatility targeting for position size
notes: Scale size to a target portfolio vol; stacks with Kelly.

title: Discord webhook rate limiting
notes: Bounded worker/queue instead of one thread per message.

title: Time-ordered split + purged CV for XGBoost
notes: Chronological per-symbol split with purge + embargo; stop bfill leakage.

title: RL exit agent: real next_state + action coverage
notes: Fix the self-loop next_state and train EXIT-early / TIGHTEN actions.

title: RL entry agent: real context in state
notes: Populate the hardcoded-constant state dimensions or drop them.

title: Champion / challenger model promotion
notes: Promote a retrained model only if it beats the live one on held-out data; atomic swap + rollback.

title: Out-of-sample retrain evaluation
notes: Evaluate retrains on a forward slice the model never saw.

title: Probability calibration of model outputs
notes: Isotonic/Platt calibration so 0.45/0.55 gate thresholds mean what they say.

title: Leakage / causality test harness
notes: Assert every feature at bar t uses only data <= t; run in CI.

title: Backtest ↔ live parity monitoring
notes: Log what the backtest would have done per live trade; alert on divergence.

title: Auth on dashboard mutating routes
notes: Token/session on kill-switch, mode, token, close-all, backtest run.

title: Dashboard token OAuth exchange
notes: Exchange the pasted auth code for a real access token server-side.

title: Pre-market screener module
notes: screener/ built: universes + cross-sectional ranking + catalysts → config/daily_watchlist.json (run via scripts/run_screener.py). Runner reads it at startup. Pure scoring core is unit-tested, no look-ahead.

title: Wire pairs + theta into ensemble / backtest
notes: Files exist but are not in the live or backtest path.

title: FinBERT news sentiment signal
notes: ProsusAI/finbert on NSE/MoneyControl headlines.

title: NSE announcements / event blackout
notes: Suppress signals around earnings/events; PEAD bias.

title: Options flow (PCR / OI / IV) signals
notes: Contrarian PCR, OI momentum, IV skew via nsepython.

title: LLM analyst agents
notes: Technical / news / risk analyst agents (TradingAgents pattern).

title: RL entry agent no longer vetoes ~100% of entries
notes: Activated agent was SKIPping every unseen Q-cell (silently halting trading). should_enter is now permissive on unseen/unlearned cells (falls back to rules) and only vetoes learned losers; activation counts real ENTER decisions.

title: Net-of-cost PnL everywhere + cost-aware entry filter
notes: Win/loss, Kelly, win-rate and the live daily-loss rail now use NET pnl (trade_log.net_pnl+cost stored); a cost-aware filter skips setups whose target can't clear round-trip costs.

title: Poll-to-terminal fill confirmation + partial-fill handling
notes: place_order polls until terminal (catches post-accept rejection); OrderResult carries filled_qty/avg_price; runner books real fills and retries partial exits.

title: ML gates only veto above a min OOS AUC + base-rate centering
notes: A model is advisory until it clears ML_GATE_MIN_AUC out-of-sample; the macro gate centres on the training base rate, not a hard 0.50 (removes the anti-LONG bias on the imbalanced label).

title: Promotion refits on full data + no in-sample fallback
notes: Challenger refit on the full window after the OOS gate passes (no freshest-data starvation); a too-short holdout keeps the champion instead of an in-sample comparison.

title: Micro model train/serve timeframe aligned (5-min)
notes: Was trained on 1-min but served on 5-min (skew). Now trains + serves on 5-min with a 6-bar horizon.

title: evaluate() made pure (no champion corruption)
notes: evaluate() no longer mutates the live model's feature_columns; snapshots + scores on trained columns.

title: Backtest short-side + next-bar-open fills
notes: Engine now simulates SHORTs (the runner trades them) and fills entries at the next bar's open (removes same-bar look-ahead) + applies the cost filter.

title: Backtest per-day EOD square-off
notes: Positions force-close at the IST session end and never fill/hold across a session boundary — matches the strictly-intraday live runner.

title: UTC→IST session features
notes: time_norm / session_open / day_of_week / expiry + RL time_of_day assumed IST but candles are stored UTC; now converted. (Fixed time_norm spanning only 0–0.12.)

title: Risk-based equity position sizing
notes: Cash equity traded 1–3 shares (F&O lot model w/ lot_size=1). Now risk-based: shares = per-trade risk budget × conviction ÷ stop distance. F&O keeps the lot model.

title: read_candles tolerates mixed tz timestamp formats
notes: Parsing crashed when the timestamp column mixed tz-aware (real backfill) and naive (demo seed) ISO; now parsed as UTC.

title: statsmodels installed (cointegration dep)
notes: Was declared but not installed → all pairs math crashed at runtime; installed into the venv.

title: Pairs health check tri-state (no false halt)
notes: An un-testable day (data gap/holidays) no longer counts toward the halt streak; window widened to 150d.

title: Pairs z-score excludes the current bar
notes: Z-score measured against the prior window so a true divergence crosses entry/stop instead of self-damping.

title: Screener correctness (volume surge / catalyst / inf / CSV)
notes: Volume-surge baseline excludes the current bar; event-risk catalyst actually penalises; zero interior close rejected (no +inf rank); --strategies CSV stripped + unknown-strategy warns.

title: RL exit agent documented as trained-but-inactive
notes: Exit agent is trained daily but never wired into live exits (purely rule-based today). Documented with the guards required before activation, so operators don't assume RL manages exits.

title: Analytics & Simulation dashboard page
notes: New /analytics page + /api/analytics/* route: gross-vs-net-vs-cost (bps) edge verdict, R-multiple distribution, what-if simulator, by-exit-reason, data-health, PAPER/LIVE toggle.

title: Backtest walk-forward auto-windowing
notes: Engine auto-fits train/test to the available span so walk-forward runs on short histories. Needs ≥150 days of real data (DATA-01) for trustworthy folds.

title: Find a cost-beating edge (BT-EDGE gate)
notes: Empirical: Phase-1 ensemble shows ~1 bp gross edge vs ~16 bps costs → net negative. Profitability gate before any paper/live.

title: Cost-aware trade selection
notes: SCORE_TIER_TRADE raised 0.65→0.68; MAX_TRADES_PER_SYMBOL_DAY=3 added; per-day counter in backtest + live runner. Cost filter tightened.

title: Tune exit structure to the 5-min timeframe
notes: LOW: sl_atr 1.5→2.0, target 2.5→3.0, trail_act 1.2→1.5, trail_lock 0.8→1.0. MEDIUM: sl_atr 1.5→2.0, target 2.0→2.8, trail_act 1.0→1.2, trail_lock 0.7→0.8.

title: Correlation / sector exposure guard
notes: risk/correlation_guard.py — sector cap (max 2/sector) + optional return-correlation cap, wired into the runner entry path. No 3-banks-at-once.

title: Regime filter on entries
notes: _MOMENTUM_BLOCK_REGIMES = {Regime.CHOPPY} wired into backtest engine + live runner. All entries blocked when regime is CHOPPY.

title: Real session-anchored ORB signal
notes: The orb/first_30m feature is mislabeled (rolling 6-bars-ago window). Build a true opening-range breakout.

title: Index / sector-breadth confirmation gate
notes: Each stock is traded in isolation today (no index/constituent context). Compute banking-sector breadth from the banks already tracked (fraction above VWAP / positive momentum) and gate entries on sector alignment; optionally subscribe to NIFTY BANK for its trend. Composes with EDGE-03 + EDGE-04. Trading Bank Nifty itself off breadth is a later F&O step.

title: Train + probability-calibrate the ML gates
notes: Needs a real training-data pipeline (DATA-01) + CalibratedClassifierCV so 0.45/0.55 cutoffs map to real precision.

title: Portfolio-realism backtest
notes: Shared capital + max-concurrent + heat cap across symbols on one timeline (today each symbol is isolated).

title: Leakage / causality CI assertion
notes: Assert every feature at bar t uses only data ≤ t.

title: Feed / loop watchdog + heartbeat
notes: Detect a dead websocket, stalled main loop, or crashed monitor thread.

title: Real data pipeline (constituents + daily/EOD + backfill)
notes: nsepython index constituents + a daily/EOD candle source + scheduled backfill. DB holds only demo data today. Prerequisite for ML-08, BT-07, the screener.

title: Backtest Lab dashboard page
notes: Run the engine from the UI (date range / symbols / risk profile / threshold sliders) with per-fold / regime / time-of-day breakdowns.

title: Model-edge dashboard panel
notes: Per ML gate: trained?, OOS AUC, base rate, reliable-vs-advisory (cleared ML_GATE_MIN_AUC?).

title: Live risk gauges dashboard panel
notes: Session net vs daily limit, portfolio heat vs cap, open positions vs max, kill/pause state.

title: Verify the transaction-cost model
notes: Confirm costs.py rates vs the actual Upstox plan + 2026 SEBI/STT/stamp/GST + realistic slippage. The edge verdict hinges on this ~16 bps figure.

title: Resolve open trading questions
notes: Starting capital · MIS vs NRML · primary timeframe · SEBI RA timing — drive risk-based sizing.

title: Spec new dashboard pages in DASHBOARD.md
notes: Analytics page spec added; Backtest Lab / model-edge / risk-gauges still to spec when built.

title: Pin a reproducible environment
notes: pyproject says Python ≥3.11 but the venv is 3.9.6; xgboost needs libomp. Rebuild on a declared interpreter, add statsmodels, document one-command setup.

title: Document UTC-store / IST-session data convention
notes: So the DATA-01 pipeline follows it; segregate/clear demo data so it never mixes with real.

title: Confirm intraday shortability / borrow
notes: The backtest now trades shorts and assumes any name is shortable (MIS).

title: Analytics Token wired into settings + backfill scripts
notes: ANALYTICS_TOKEN in .env.example, config/settings.py, data/upstox_history.py. get_api_client() prefers it over LIVE_ACCESS_TOKEN. CLI adds --universe flag for 750-symbol backfill.

title: Generate Analytics Token + 2-year 5-min backfill (750 symbols)
notes: Generate at developer.upstox.com → Analytics tab. Run: python data/upstox_history.py --universe --days 730 --tf 5min. Est: 2–4 hrs overnight.

title: Train ML models on real data (macro + micro XGBoost)
notes: Run scripts/train_macro.py + train_micro.py after backfill. Gate: OOS AUC ≥ 0.53. Add CalibratedClassifierCV (isotonic) before saving.

title: Train RL entry + exit agents on replay episodes
issue_ref: Run Action Replay on 60+ dates → build trade_log → train_rl_exit.py + train_rl_entry.py. Do NOT activate RL in live until ≥ 500 training episodes.

title: Walk-forward validation on real data (Phase 0 exit gate)
notes: Run scripts/run_backtest.py --days 500 --walk-forward on real candles. Gate: Sharpe > 0.8, net win-rate ≥ 50% on ≥ 150 OOS days. Unlocks Phase 1 paper trading.

title: Exit All Positions API in circuit breaker
notes: POST /v2/order/positions/exit — single call flattens all open positions. Wire into risk/circuit_breaker.py on DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT breach. Only works during market hours.

title: Corporate Actions calendar — suppress signals on ex-date
issue_ref: GET /v2/fundamentals/{isin}/corporate-actions → skip all signals on ex-dividend/split date (mechanical price drop = false short signal).

title: PCR as intraday regime modifier
issue_ref: GET /v2/market/pcr → PCR > 1.3 = contrarian long bias, < 0.7 = contrarian short. Session-level modifier in ensemble/aggregator.py.

title: Market Holidays + Exchange Status gating
issue_ref: GET /v2/market/status + /v2/market/holidays — gate live runner on actual status; auto-skip holidays in backfill loop instead of hitting empty API responses.

title: FII/DII data via Upstox API (replace NSE scraper)
issue_ref: GET /v2/market/fii + /v2/market/dii → pre-market session bias modifier. Replaces NSE website scraping with a clean first-party API call in screener/daily_screener.py.
